transcript.final_response:
The 3 most frequently used words in the poem are:

```
the 8
on 3
cat 2
```

The word "the" appears 8 times, "on" appears 3 times, and "cat" appears 2 times.
tool_calls: cat /data/poem.txt | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -v '^$' | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -3 | awk '{print $2, $1}'

tool_outputs.stdout:
the cat sat on the mat
the cat in the hat
the dog on the log
the frog on the bog
